articles.title: 'That's not how it works' - the judge crossing swords with Musk in court - BBC
articles.description: The feud has fuelled a costly showdown between two tech titans.
articles.content: "There are certain judges who, if they're on the case, you kind of stand up a little bit straighter," said Edelson. "You want to make sure everything's right, that your tie's on straight, and that yo… [+24 chars]

articles.title: FDA vaccine studies censored by Trump admin after finding benefits of shots - Ars Technica
articles.description: FDA has suppressed studies on COVID-19 vaccines and Shingrix, a shingles vaccine.
